bold.description: Whether the text is formatted as bold.

italic.description: Whether the text is formatted as italic.

strikethrough.description: Whether the text is formatted with a strikethrough.

underline.description: Whether the text is formatted with an underline.

code.description: Whether the text is formatted as code.

id.description: Unique identifier for this webhook event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred. Can be used to order events.

workspace_id.description: The ID of the workspace where the event originated.

workspace_name.description: The name of the workspace where the event originated.

subscription_id.description: The ID of the webhook subscription.

integration_id.description: The ID of the integration the subscription is set up with.

id.description: The ID of the user.
The ID of the bot.

authors.description: The users or bots that performed the action. Typically an array of length 1; can be more for aggregated events.

attempt_number.description: The delivery attempt number (1-8) of the current event delivery.

api_version.description: The Notion API version that was used to render this webhook event's shape.

id.description: The ID of the user.
The ID of the bot.

accessible_by.description: The users or bots who own the bot connection to the `integration_id` and have access to the webhook's `entity`. Only present for public integrations.

block_id.description: The ID of the parent block.

sub_group_by.description: Secondary group-by configuration for sub-grouping within columns. Pass null to remove sub-grouping.

properties.description: Property visibility and display configuration on cards. Pass null to clear.

cover.description: Cover image configuration for cards. Pass null to clear.

oneOf.description: One of: `small`, `medium`, `large`

cover_size.description: Size of the cover image on cards. Pass null to clear.

oneOf.description: One of: `contain`, `cover`

cover_aspect.description: Aspect ratio mode for cover images. "contain" fits the image, "cover" fills the area. Pass null to clear.

oneOf.description: One of: `list`, `compact`

card_layout.description: Card layout mode. "list" shows full cards, "compact" shows condensed cards. Pass null to clear.

group_by.description: Column (horizontal) grouping - required for board view.

properties.description: Properties to display on each card.

card_layout.description: Card layout mode (list shows all properties, compact shows inline).

id.description: The ID of the user.

name.description: The name of the user.

avatar_url.description: The avatar URL of the user.

person.description: The person info of the user.

user.description: Details about the owner of the bot, when the `type` of the owner is `user`. This means the bot is for a integration.

workspace.description: Details about the owner of the bot, when the `type` of the owner is `workspace`. This means the bot is for an internal integration.

owner.description: Details about the owner of the bot.

workspace_id.description: The ID of the bot's workspace.

max_file_upload_size_in_bytes.description: The maximum allowable size of a file upload, in bytes

workspace_limits.description: Limits and restrictions that apply to the bot's workspace

workspace_name.description: The name of the bot's workspace.

type.description: Indicates this user is a bot.

bot.description: Details about the bot, when the `type` of the user is `bot`.

date_property_id.description: Property ID of the date property used to position items on the calendar.

properties.description: Property visibility and display configuration on calendar cards. Pass null to clear.

oneOf.description: One of: `week`, `month`

view_range.description: Default calendar range. "week" shows a week view, "month" shows a month view. Pass null to clear.

show_weekends.description: Whether to show weekend days. Pass null to clear.

date_property_id.description: Date property used to position items on the calendar - required.

properties.description: Properties to display on calendar event cards.

aggregator.description: The aggregation operator. "count" counts all rows and does not require a property_id. All other operators require a property_id.

property_id.description: The property to aggregate on. Required for all operators except "count".

aggregator.description: The aggregation operator. "count" counts all rows and does not require a property_id. All other operators require a property_id.

property_id.description: The property to aggregate on. Required for all operators except "count".

value.description: The y-axis value where the reference line is drawn.

label.description: Label displayed alongside the reference line.

dash_style.description: Line style: "solid" for a continuous line, "dash" for a dashed line.

y_axis.description: Y-axis aggregation for grouped data mode. Pass null to clear.

value.description: Aggregation for number charts. Pass null to clear.

sort.description: Sort order for chart data. Pass null to clear.

color_theme.description: Color theme. Pass null to clear.

height.description: Chart height. Pass null to clear.

hide_empty_groups.description: Whether to hide groups with no data. Pass null to clear.

legend_position.description: Legend position. Pass null to clear.

show_data_labels.description: Whether to show data labels. Pass null to clear.

oneOf.description: One of: `none`, `x_axis`, `y_axis`, `both`

axis_labels.description: Which axis labels to show. Pass null to clear.

oneOf.description: One of: `none`, `horizontal`, `vertical`, `both`

grid_lines.description: Which grid lines to show. Pass null to clear.

cumulative.description: Cumulative values (line only). Pass null to clear.

smooth_line.description: Smooth line curves (line only). Pass null to clear.

hide_line_fill_area.description: Hide area fill (line only). Pass null to clear.

oneOf.description: One of: `normal`, `percent`, `side_by_side`

group_style.description: Grouped/stacked bar display style. Pass null to clear.

y_axis_min.description: Custom y-axis minimum. Pass null to clear.

y_axis_max.description: Custom y-axis maximum. Pass null to clear.

oneOf.description: One of: `none`, `value`, `name`, `name_and_value`

donut_labels.description: Donut slice labels. Pass null to clear.

hide_title.description: Hide title (number only). Pass null to clear.

stack_by.description: Stack-by grouping for stacked/grouped bar charts. Pass null to clear.

reference_lines.description: Reference lines on the chart. Pass null to clear.

caption.description: Chart caption text. Pass null to clear.

color_by_value.description: Whether to color chart elements by their numeric value (gradient coloring). Pass null to clear.

chart_type.description: The chart type: column (vertical bars), bar (horizontal bars), line, donut, or number (single value display).

x_axis.description: X-axis grouping configuration for column/bar/line/donut charts using grouped data. Null when using results (raw property values) mode.

y_axis.description: Y-axis aggregation for column/bar/line/donut charts using grouped data. Null when using results mode.

x_axis_property_id.description: Property ID for the x-axis name values when using results (raw property values) mode.

y_axis_property_id.description: Property ID for the y-axis numeric values when using results (raw property values) mode.

value.description: Aggregation configuration for number charts (single value display).

hide_empty_groups.description: Whether to hide groups with no data on the x-axis.

legend_position.description: Legend display position. "off" hides the legend.

show_data_labels.description: Whether to show data value labels on chart elements.

cumulative.description: Whether to show cumulative values (line charts only).

smooth_line.description: Whether to use smooth curves (line charts only).

hide_line_fill_area.description: Whether to hide the shaded area under the line (line charts only).

group_style.description: How grouped/stacked bars are displayed. "normal" stacks values, "percent" normalizes to 100%, "side_by_side" places bars next to each other.

y_axis_min.description: Custom minimum value for the y-axis. Null clears the override.

y_axis_max.description: Custom maximum value for the y-axis. Null clears the override.

donut_labels.description: What to display on donut chart slices.

hide_title.description: Whether to hide the title label (number charts only).

stack_by.description: Stack-by grouping configuration for stacked/grouped bar charts (column/bar/line only). Null when not stacked.

reference_lines.description: Reference lines drawn on the chart. Null when no reference lines are configured.

caption.description: Text caption displayed below the chart. Null when no caption is shown.

color_by_value.description: Whether chart elements are colored by their numeric value (gradient coloring).

hide_empty_groups.description: Whether to hide groups that have no items.

sort.description: Sort order for groups (only manual for checkbox).

hide_empty_groups.description: Whether to hide groups that have no items.

width_ratio.description: Ratio between 0 and 1 of the width of this column relative to all columns in the list. If not provided, uses an equal width.
Ratio between 0 and 1 of the width of this column relative to all columns in the list. If not provided, uses an equal width.

The ID of the page to create the database on.

parent.description: The parent page for the new linked database block.

type.description: Position type. "after_block" places the new database after the specified block in the page.

block_id.description: The ID of an existing block in the page. The new database will be placed after this block.

position.description: Where to place the new database block within the parent page. Defaults to appending at the end.

page_size.description: The number of results to return per page. Maximum: 100

data_source_id.description: The ID of the data source this view should be scoped to.

name.description: The name of the view.

type.description: The type of view to create.

database_id.description: The ID of the database to create a view in. Mutually exclusive with view_id and create_database.

view_id.description: The ID of a dashboard view to add this view to as a widget. Mutually exclusive with database_id and create_database.

filter.description: Filter to apply to the view. Uses the same format as the data source query filter.

sorts.description: Sorts to apply to the view. Uses the same format as the data source query sorts.

quick_filters.description: Quick filters to pin in the view's filter bar. Keys are property names or IDs. Values are filter conditions (same shape as a property filter but without the property field). Each quick filter appears as a clickable pill above the view, independent of the advanced filter.

create_database.description: Create a new linked database block on a page and add the view to it. Mutually exclusive with database_id and view_id.

configuration.description: View presentation configuration. The type field must match the view type.

position.description: Where to place the new view in the database's view tab bar. Only applicable when database_id is provided. Defaults to "end" (append).

placement.description: Where to place the new widget in a dashboard view. Only applicable when view_id is provided. Defaults to creating a new row at the end.

display_mode.description: How sub-items are displayed. "show" renders hierarchically with toggles, "hidden" shows parents with a count, "flattened" shows sub-items with a parent indicator, "disabled" turns off sub-item rendering.

group_by.description: Group-by configuration for the table. Pass null to remove grouping.

subtasks.description: Subtask (sub-item) configuration. Pass null to reset subtask config to defaults (which may show subtasks). Use `{ "display_mode": "disabled" }` to explicitly disable subtasks.

sorts.description: Property sorts to apply to the view. Only property-based sorts are supported. Pass null to clear the sorts.

quick_filters.description: Quick filters for the view's filter bar. Keys are property names or IDs. Set a key to a filter condition to add/update that quick filter. Set a key to null to remove it. Pass null for the entire field to clear all quick filters. Unmentioned quick filters are preserved.

configuration.description: View presentation configuration. The type field must match the view type. Individual nullable fields within the configuration can be set to null to clear them.

viewFilterRequest.description: Filter for the view. Uses the same format as the data source query filter (property filters, timestamp filters, or compound and/or filters). Simple property filters appear in the view's filter bar in the Notion UI. To filter by multiple values on a select or status property, use a compound "or" filter with separate "equals" conditions for each value.

oneOf.description: A filter condition on a specific property. The property field specifies which property to filter, and an additional field specifies the filter type and condition (e.g., title, rich_text, number, checkbox, select, multi_select, date, people, files, relation, formula, rollup, etc.).

property.description: The name or ID of the property to filter on.

oneOf.description: A filter condition on a timestamp (created_time or last_edited_time). The timestamp field specifies which timestamp, and a matching field contains the date filter condition.
A compound filter that combines multiple filters with AND or OR logic. Supports up to 2 levels of nesting.

type.description: Position type. "start" places the view as the first tab.

Position type. "after_view" places the new view immediately after the specified view.

time_format.description: Time display format (date properties only). "12_hour" = 12-hour clock with AM/PM, "24_hour" = 24-hour clock, "hidden" = hide time.

Whether to include meeting note transcripts. Defaults to false. When true, full transcripts are included; when false, a placeholder with the meeting note URL is shown instead.

patch.summary: Update a page's content as markdown

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK

schema.description: The ID of the page to update.

content.description: The enhanced markdown content to insert into the page.

after.description: Selection of existing content to insert after, using the ellipsis format ("start text...end text"). Omit to append at the end of the page.

insert_content.description: Insert new content into the page.

examples:
## Updated Section

New content replaces the old.
content.description: The new enhanced markdown content to replace the matched range.

content_range.description: Selection of existing content to replace, using the ellipsis format ("start text...end text").

allow_deleting_content.description: Set to true to allow the operation to delete child pages or databases. Defaults to false.

replace_content_range.description: Replace a range of content in the page.

old_str.description: The existing content string to find and replace. Must exactly match the page content.

new_str.description: The new content string to replace old_str with.

replace_all_matches.description: If true, replaces all occurrences of old_str. If false (default), the operation fails if there are multiple matches.

content_updates.description: An array of search-and-replace operations, each with old_str (content to find) and new_str (replacement content).

allow_deleting_content.description: Set to true to allow the operation to delete child pages or databases. Defaults to false.

update_content.description: Update specific content using search-and-replace operations.

examples:
# Updated Page

Completely new page content.
new_str.description: The new enhanced markdown content to replace the entire page content.

allow_deleting_content.description: Set to true to allow the operation to delete child pages or databases. Defaults to false.

replace_content.description: Replace the entire page content with new markdown.

patch.description: Update a page's content as markdown

mode.description: How the file is being sent. Use `multi_part` for files larger than 20MB. Use `external_url` for files that are temporarily hosted publicly elsewhere. Default is `single_part`.

filename.description: Name of the file to be created. Required when `mode` is `multi_part`. Otherwise optional, and used to override the filename. Must include an extension, or have one inferred from the `content_type` parameter.

content_type.description: MIME type of the file to be created. Recommended when sending the file in multiple parts. Must match the content type of the file that's sent, and the extension of the `filename` parameter if any.

number_of_parts.description: When `mode` is `multi_part`, the number of parts you are uploading. This must match the number of parts as well as the final `part_number` you send.

external_url.description: When `mode` is `external_url`, provide the HTTPS URL of a publicly accessible file to import into your workspace.

ID of a data source (collection) to list all views for, including linked views across the workspace. At least one of database_id or data_source_id is required.
If supplied, this endpoint will return a page of results starting after the cursor provided. If not supplied, this endpoint will return the first page of results.
The number of items from the full list desired in the response. Maximum: 100
